/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Scenes/TitleScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Scenes/GameScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Scenes/GameClearScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Entities/Ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Entities/Paddle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Entities/Block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Entities/BlockManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/System/CollisionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/UI/Score.cpp.o -o Breakout  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-audio.a -ObjC -framework OpenGL -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework IOKit -framework Carbon _deps/sfml-build/lib/libfreetype.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libvorbisfile.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libvorbisenc.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libvorbis.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libFLAC.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libogg.a -lm
